positive: A retro-futuristic portrait of a cyberpunk cat wearing glowing augmented reality glasses, sitting on a neon-lit rooftop overlooking a rainy, dystopian city. Style: Synthwave aesthetic, vaporwave color scheme (magenta, cyan, electric blue), high contrast, comic book ink style, cinematic depth of field, 4K illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic fur, messy background, grain
